description: Offline versioned ClinicalTrials.gov fixture set for SGLT2 inhibitors in T2DM + CKD. Records use the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API response structure. These are manually curated fixtures, NOT live API responses.
query_context: SGLT2 inhibitors (empagliflozin, dapagliflozin, canagliflozin) AND chronic kidney disease AND type 2 diabetes
notes: NCT IDs correspond to real registered trials as of the curated_at date.
These fixtures do not include full protocol or results data — only study-level metadata.
